LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_FMJ.label: 5x23mm Caseless cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_FMJ.description: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile. It is used by UNSC SMGs.
LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_AP.label: 5x23mm Caseless cartridge (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_AP.description: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile. It is used by UNSC SMGs.
LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_HP.label: 5x23mm Caseless cartridge (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_5x23mmCaseless_HP.description: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile. It is used by UNSC SMGs.
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_FMJ.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_AP.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_HP.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (HP)
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_Incendiary.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_HE.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_5x23mmCaseless_Sabot.label: 5mm Caseless bullet (Sabot)
